channel.title: friendly.atheist TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from friendly.atheist

item.title: A Kansas megachurch pastor, Adam Hamilton, is exploring a run for the U.S. Senate—and the GOP is scared. They've already filed an ethics complaint with the Federal Election Commission. Are they really concerned about church/state separation or are they j
item.description: A Kansas megachurch pastor, Adam Hamilton, is exploring a run for the U.S. Senate—and the GOP is scared. They've already filed an ethics complaint with the Federal Election Commission. Are they really concerned about church/state separation or are they j

item.title: The White House’s “Anti-Christian Bias” report claims Christians were being treated unfairly by the Biden Administration. But it mostly complains about Christians being held to the same standards as everyone else. Instead of documenting real bias, the re
item.description: The White House’s “Anti-Christian Bias” report claims Christians were being treated unfairly by the Biden Administration. But it mostly complains about Christians being held to the same standards as everyone else. Instead of documenting real bias, the re

item.title: Former Spokane mayor Nadine Woodward is suing her own city for $10 million, claiming a City Council resolution criticizing her appearance at a religious rally violated her First Amendment rights. That 2023 rally was led by Christian Nationalist Sean Feuc
item.description: Former Spokane mayor Nadine Woodward is suing her own city for $10 million, claiming a City Council resolution criticizing her appearance at a religious rally violated her First Amendment rights. That 2023 rally was led by Christian Nationalist Sean Feuc

item.title: Norway’s Supreme Court just ruled that Jehovah’s Witnesses can once again receive government funding after officials revoked them over concerns about internal practices like shunning. The decision reignites a bigger debate: When governments fund faith, w
item.description: Norway’s Supreme Court just ruled that Jehovah’s Witnesses can once again receive government funding after officials revoked them over concerns about internal practices like shunning. The decision reignites a bigger debate: When governments fund faith, w

item.title: Victory Church in East Palatka, Florida is reeling after Caleb Roberts, a youth pastor, was caught in an undercover sting and confronted on camera—leading to a shocking confession and a call to his pastor father. Now his parents have stepped down and an i

item.title: A new Christian cellphone company called Radiant Mobile says it wants to create a “Jesus-centric” internet by blocking adult content, LGBTQ content, and other material it considers inappropriate directly at the network level. The company says it’s about p
item.description: A new Christian cellphone company called Radiant Mobile says it wants to create a “Jesus-centric” internet by blocking adult content, LGBTQ content, and other material it considers inappropriate directly at the network level. The company says it’s about p

item.title: Paul Pressler helped transform the Southern Baptist Convention into a powerful conservative political force—but the culture he helped create came with devastating consequences. These hypocrites wanted loyalty and power and didn't care if abuse permeated
item.description: Paul Pressler helped transform the Southern Baptist Convention into a powerful conservative political force—but the culture he helped create came with devastating consequences. These hypocrites wanted loyalty and power and didn't care if abuse permeated

item.title: Richard Dawkins spent decades warning people not to believe comforting illusions… and now he’s emotionally attached to an AI chatbot named “Claudia.” All it took was a lot of flattery and validation. #RichardDawkins #ArtificialIntelligence #ClaudeAI #Ath
item.description: Richard Dawkins spent decades warning people not to believe comforting illusions… and now he’s emotionally attached to an AI chatbot named “Claudia.” All it took was a lot of flattery and validation. #RichardDawkins #ArtificialIntelligence #ClaudeAI #Ath

item.title: The Southern Baptist Convention just hit a 50-year membership low after losing nearly 400,000 members in a single year. SBC leaders are celebrating higher baptism numbers… but after 19 straight years of decline, younger Americans seem increasingly turned
item.description: The Southern Baptist Convention just hit a 50-year membership low after losing nearly 400,000 members in a single year. SBC leaders are celebrating higher baptism numbers… but after 19 straight years of decline, younger Americans seem increasingly turned

item.title: For years, pastor Greg Locke accused celebrities like Joel Osteen, Oprah, Tom Hanks, and Kenneth Copeland of horrific crimes while claiming he had proof. He now admits he never had any evidence at all. #GregLocke #JoelOsteen #KennethCopeland #ChristianNa
item.description: For years, pastor Greg Locke accused celebrities like Joel Osteen, Oprah, Tom Hanks, and Kenneth Copeland of horrific crimes while claiming he had proof. He now admits he never had any evidence at all. #GregLocke #JoelOsteen #KennethCopeland #ChristianNa

item.title: Joni Lamb, co-founder of Daystar Television Network, has died. But her legacy is far more complicated than the tributes suggest. The Daystar story is really a symbol of modern televangelist hypocrisy. #JoniLamb #MarcusLamb #DaystarTelevision #ChristianNat
item.description: Joni Lamb, co-founder of Daystar Television Network, has died. But her legacy is far more complicated than the tributes suggest. The Daystar story is really a symbol of modern televangelist hypocrisy. #JoniLamb #MarcusLamb #DaystarTelevision #ChristianNat

item.description: No Description

item.title: MAGA pastor Robert Jeffress went on Fox News to argue that Donald Trump understands the Bible better than Pope Leo… because Trump supports military action against Iran while the pope is calling for peace. It says a lot about why Christian Nationalism has
item.description: MAGA pastor Robert Jeffress went on Fox News to argue that Donald Trump understands the Bible better than Pope Leo… because Trump supports military action against Iran while the pope is calling for peace. It says a lot about why Christian Nationalism has

item.title: The Trump White House is backing a massive “Rededicate 250” event on the National Mall this weekend that blends patriotism, government power, and conservative Christianity into one giant revival. With MAGA pastors, military bands, and taxpayer-supported
item.description: The Trump White House is backing a massive “Rededicate 250” event on the National Mall this weekend that blends patriotism, government power, and conservative Christianity into one giant revival. With MAGA pastors, military bands, and taxpayer-supported

item.title: Federal employees are suing Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins after receiving government emails promoting Christianity. The workers say they felt pressured to stay quiet about their own beliefs while Rollins blurred the line between church and state.
item.description: Federal employees are suing Agriculture Secretary Brooke Rollins after receiving government emails promoting Christianity. The workers say they felt pressured to stay quiet about their own beliefs while Rollins blurred the line between church and state.

item.title: A California judge just ruled that the famous Kars4Kids commercials are misleading because they never clearly explain where donated car money actually goes: To promote Orthodox Jewish religious programs and outreach efforts. The charity will now have to
item.description: A California judge just ruled that the famous Kars4Kids commercials are misleading because they never clearly explain where donated car money actually goes: To promote Orthodox Jewish religious programs and outreach efforts. The charity will now have to

item.title: The Trump administration wants to cut off federal student loans for college programs whose graduates don’t earn enough money after graduation. Conservatives thought this would target “woke” liberal arts majors… but it will also target programs like Bible
item.description: The Trump administration wants to cut off federal student loans for college programs whose graduates don’t earn enough money after graduation. Conservatives thought this would target “woke” liberal arts majors… but it will also target programs like Bible

item.title: The Plymouth Brethren Christian Church is facing backlash after reports revealed members are being pressured to get rid of their pets because animals are considered “unclean” and distractions from God. Former members describe heartbreaking stories involv
item.description: The Plymouth Brethren Christian Church is facing backlash after reports revealed members are being pressured to get rid of their pets because animals are considered “unclean” and distractions from God. Former members describe heartbreaking stories involv

item.title: Oklahoma just became the 17th state to ban child marriage with no exceptions, which is great news, but 36 Republican lawmakers voted against the bill. To do it, they made arguments about parental rights, the Bible, abortion, and even Socialism. It just s

item.title: Christian Nationalists in Rockwall County, Texas just unveiled a massive Ten Commandments monument outside a courthouse. It's undoubtedly a violation of the Constitution. The fight over church-state separation in Texas is escalating fast. #TenCommandment
item.description: Christian Nationalists in Rockwall County, Texas just unveiled a massive Ten Commandments monument outside a courthouse. It's undoubtedly a violation of the Constitution. The fight over church-state separation in Texas is escalating fast. #TenCommandment

item.title: Christian Nationalist Jason Rapert thanked me for giving him “free” publicity after I criticized a giant Ten Commandments monument outside a Texas courthouse. But while bragging that his monuments are “absolutely legal,” he conveniently ignored one huge
item.description: Christian Nationalist Jason Rapert thanked me for giving him “free” publicity after I criticized a giant Ten Commandments monument outside a Texas courthouse. But while bragging that his monuments are “absolutely legal,” he conveniently ignored one huge

item.title: A political consulting firm admitted how easy and cheap it is to target religious voters - and why that spells disaster for the future. Their candidates tend to rely on church networks and vague “God and country” messaging. But younger, non-religious vot
item.description: A political consulting firm admitted how easy and cheap it is to target religious voters - and why that spells disaster for the future. Their candidates tend to rely on church networks and vague “God and country” messaging. But younger, non-religious vot

item.title: A Louisiana attorney named Richard Trahant warned a Catholic school that its chaplain had previously been accused of misconduct involving a teenager. The priest quickly retired. But instead of rewarding the whistleblower, the courts fined him $400,000 for
item.description: A Louisiana attorney named Richard Trahant warned a Catholic school that its chaplain had previously been accused of misconduct involving a teenager. The priest quickly retired. But instead of rewarding the whistleblower, the courts fined him $400,000 for

item.title: For those of you who enjoy solving crosswords, Friday’s New York Times puzzle is one I wrote! It includes 11 entries that have never appeared in the paper before. Good luck! Tell me what you think! #NYTCrossword #Crossword #NYTGames
item.description: For those of you who enjoy solving crosswords, Friday’s New York Times puzzle is one I wrote! It includes 11 entries that have never appeared in the paper before. Good luck! Tell me what you think! #NYTCrossword #Crossword #NYTGames

item.title: A self-described prophet at a West Virginia megachurch told a teenager to eat a page from the Book of Proverbs while the congregation cheered him on. It's a powerful example of how religious leaders can use pressure, authority, and public spectacle to te
item.description: A self-described prophet at a West Virginia megachurch told a teenager to eat a page from the Book of Proverbs while the congregation cheered him on. It's a powerful example of how religious leaders can use pressure, authority, and public spectacle to te

item.title: Ken Ham's Ark Encounter is about to celebrate its 10th anniversary, but the massive Noah's Ark "replica" hasn't lived up to the promises used to justify it. From inflated economic projections to taxpayer-backed incentives, the Creationist theme park is a

item.title: Connecticut just passed a modest law designed to protect homeschooled children in homes where adults are already under investigation for abuse or neglect. Naturally, conservatives are treating it as an attack on parental rights. #Homeschooling #Education
item.description: Connecticut just passed a modest law designed to protect homeschooled children in homes where adults are already under investigation for abuse or neglect. Naturally, conservatives are treating it as an attack on parental rights. #Homeschooling #Education

item.title: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has dramatically reduced the number of religious and non-religious identities recognized by the U.S. military, eliminating categories like Humanist, atheist, Pagan, and others. This accomplishes nothing. #PeteHegseth #Milit
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth has dramatically reduced the number of religious and non-religious identities recognized by the U.S. military, eliminating categories like Humanist, atheist, Pagan, and others. This accomplishes nothing. #PeteHegseth #Milit
